title: Meeting summary: decisions and next steps
subtitle: Report what was decided in a professional setting.
duolingoBridge: B1 Hi moves from controlled B1 into native-style but accessible French: short articles, real conversations, nuanced opinions, and longer connected output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: separate discussion, decision, and action.
Knowledge point 2: use precise but simple professional French.

items.fr: Lors de la réunion, nous avons abordé le problème du retard.
items.en: During the meeting, we discussed the problem of the delay.
items.es: Durante la reunión, abordamos el problema del retraso.

items.fr: Plusieurs personnes ont expliqué que le calendrier était trop serré.
items.en: Several people explained that the schedule was too tight.
items.es: Varias personas explicaron que el calendario era demasiado ajustado.

items.fr: Il a été décidé que la première version serait simplifiée.
items.en: It was decided that the first version would be simplified.
items.es: Se decidió que la primera versión sería simplificada.

items.fr: La priorité sera de finir les parties les plus importantes.
items.en: The priority will be to finish the most important parts.
items.es: La prioridad será terminar las partes más importantes.

items.fr: D’ici la semaine prochaine, chacun devra envoyer ses corrections.
items.en: By next week, everyone will have to send their corrections.
items.es: Para la próxima semana, cada uno deberá enviar sus correcciones.
